name: Bracken
description: A tall humanoid creature that stalks you from behind. Looking at it directly causes it to retreat — but stare too long and it will snap your neck.

name: Forest Keeper
description: A massive giant that roams outdoor areas. It will pick you up and eat you. Running is your only option.

name: Hoarding Bug
description: Collects scrap and guards it fiercely. Harmless if you leave its loot alone — but provoke it and it swarms.

name: Coil-Head
description: A spring-necked mannequin that charges at full speed — but only when you look away. Never break eye contact.

name: Jester
description: Winds up slowly while you hear its music box tune. Once it pops, it chases and kills everyone instantly. Get out of the building.
